parents.subject: LU-18456 trash: I/O operative limiting for a file in Trash Can

commit.subject: LU-18800 tcu: forbid to create a file with name ".Trash"
commit.message:
LU-18800 tcu: forbid to create a file with name ".Trash"

It is forbidden to create a file with the target name of ".Trash"
via the system calls such as mkdir()/create()/mknod/rename()/
link()/symlink().

Add a test case sanityn/117i to check it.

Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I606e2f0f57886025ba6e99b5f9213c6ba98131b4
